_description: Multiple files in one diff — line counters reset per-file, paths preserved
_diff:
diff --git a/a.py b/a.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/a.py
+++ b/a.py
@@ -5,0 +6,1 @@
+a = 1  # type: ignore
diff --git a/sub/b.py b/sub/b.py
index 3333333..4444444 100644
--- a/sub/b.py
+++ b/sub/b.py
@@ -10,0 +11,2 @@
+b = 2
+c = 3  # noqa: B008
